title: Integrated mobile holder system for motor vehicle
abstract: The present invention relates to a mobile phone holding system for motor vehicles. The handlebar cover (102) of the motor vehicles comprises of cluster mounting (103) and mobile holder arrangement for holding mobile devices of various sizes. The mobile holder arrangement is installed at an angle that provides the driver with improved ergonomics of driver's line of sight for mobile and cluster visibility. The holder arrangement (104) protects the device from falling down during driving even on potholes roads as well as minimizes the risk of theft of mobile placed in the holder.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. An integrated mobile holder system (100) for motor vehicle, comprising: (a) a handlebar cover (102) installed with a cluster mounting (103); (b) a mobile holder arrangement (104) integrated with the handlebar cover (102), comprising; i. a mobile holder (105) bolted from inside of the handlebar cover (102) and coupled to the cluster mounting (103), ; and ii. a plurality of retractable securing means to secure mobile devices of varied dimensions in place; 2. The integrated mobile holder system (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the retractable securing means comprises a plurality of mounting brackets (106). 3. The integrated mobile holder system (100) as claimed in claim 2, wherein the mounting brackets (106) are coupled to one or more positions of the mobile holder (105) to hold mobile devices of various sizes. 4. The integrated mobile holder system (100) as claimed in claim 2, wherein the mounting brackets (106) are adjustable and set according to the size of the mobile devices used by the driver. 5. The integrated mobile holder system (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the mobile holder (105) is coupled to the cluster mounting (103) through a plurality of fasteners. 6. The integrated mobile holder system (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the mobile holder (105) is positioned at 40Â° angle of eye zone of the driver. 7. The integrated mobile holder system (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the mounting bracket (106) is welded with a stud (107). 8. The integrated mobile holder system (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the stud (107) is assembled on the handlebar cover (102) through tightening nut from inside to prevent dismantling of the holder (105) from inside. .
